ideas.title: Claude can make the cartoon, not just the plan
ideas.about: Show Claude moving from strategy helper to creative production partner: prompt, image, cartoon clip, and campaign angle for one real local business.
ideas.evidence: Braydon's latest Claude cartoon post reached 39.9K views with 442 shares, while his recent Claude creative/Higgsfield cluster still includes a 169.2K-view account winner. Justyn also posted a fresh Claude Design + Codex workflow today.
ideas.spokenHook: `Claude used to help you plan the campaign. Now it can help make the image and the cartoon, so here is what that means for a real business.`
ideas.why: This is account-native evidence, not just a competitor copy. Braydon's audience is already rewarding visual Claude demos.

ideas.title: Ask ChatGPT where your money is going
ideas.about: Explain the new ChatGPT personal finance preview in plain English, then give 3 safe questions a small business owner could ask before talking to their accountant.
ideas.evidence: ChatGPTapp's official X post on May 15 announced a Pro personal finance experience with connected accounts and 23.1K likes. Nocode.joshua's Claude finance agents post hit 233.8K views, 2.8K shares, and 11.3K saves.
ideas.spokenHook: `This is not about replacing your accountant. It is about walking into the meeting with better questions.`
ideas.why: It combines a fresh official OpenAI source with a proven competitor finance wave, but reframes it in Braydon's human, practical voice.

ideas.title: Build your marketing department with Claude Code
ideas.about: A simple “human still approves everything” workflow where Claude Code researches ideas, drafts hooks, creates assets, and queues posts, but Braydon explains what should never be automated.
ideas.evidence: Sabrina's fresh Claude Code marketing-department post reached 8.8K views, 74 comments, and 324 saves in under a day. Justyn's Claude Design + Codex post is fresh today, and Braydon's Claude creative cluster is already working.
ideas.spokenHook: `If you run a small business, this is the version of AI automation I actually like: it does the busywork, but you still make the final call.`
ideas.why: The pattern is hot, but this angle avoids “replace your team” hype and matches Braydon's mentor positioning.

ideas.title: Move your ChatGPT brain into Claude
ideas.about: Show the migration/context handoff in a business use case: brand voice, ideal customer, offers, FAQs, and constraints.
ideas.evidence: Sabrina's ChatGPT-to-Claude migration post is still climbing at 29.3K views, 274 shares, and 995 saves. This remains one of the strongest recent practical Claude workflows in the competitor set.
ideas.spokenHook: `If you want to try Claude but do not want to start from scratch, bring over the context that actually matters.`
ideas.why: High saves signal utility. Braydon can make it more useful by showing exactly what context a business owner should carry over.

ideas.title: The beginner AI agent that does the boring work
ideas.about: Explain “no setup” agents for normal people: Gmail, calendar, research, tasks, and one safe workflow to try first.
ideas.evidence: Marcinteodoru's AI SuperAgents post reached 31.9K views, 553 shares, and 1.8K saves. The caption specifically frames it as beginner friendly with no setup, no config, and no coding headache.
ideas.spokenHook: `Most AI agent videos are for technical people. This is the version I would show a normal business owner first.`
ideas.why: Strong save/share ratio and a clean Frank-friendly explainer angle.

competitors.creator: sabrina_ramonov
competitors.text: Follow and comment "JOB" and I'll send you all the prompts 👇 I'm seeing thousands of AI resumes. Most still fail. Not because they're bad. Because they don't speak the company's language back to the recruiter. Here's the 4-prompt chain 1000+ people used to fix it: Prompt 1: Extract the company's language for skills, outcomes, and traits. Rank by importance. Map each to your closest bullet. Flag gaps. Prompt 2: Ask up to 3 clarifying questions, then rewrite your bullets using the company's exact language without lying about anything. Each bullet under 20 words, metric-driven. Prompt 3: Score your resume vs. the job description. Keyword match, skills, outcomes, role fit. Give a percentage. List missing high-priority terms. Tell me exactly how to hit 80%. Bonus prompt: Act as a hiring manager reviewing my resume for 10 seconds. Would you interview me? What's your biggest doubt and how do I fix it? Never lie on your resume. But this process shows you exactly how recruiters read yours. #resumetips #jobsearch #chatgptprompts #aitips #careertips
competitors.topic: How to beat 1000+ other job applicants ethically w/o lying 🤔
competitors.onScreenTitle: How to beat 1000+ other job applicants ethically w/o lying 🤔
competitors.spokenHook: I'm seeing thousands of AI resumes. Here is the only prompt chain that makes yours actually pass.

competitors.creator: sabrina_ramonov
competitors.text: Follow and comment "PROMPT" and I'll send you hundreds of ChatGPT prompts 👇 ChatGPT agrees with everything you say by default. This 1 custom instruction changes everything. Go to Settings > Personalization > Custom Instructions and paste this: "Prioritize critical thinking by identifying flaws, bias, or missing data in everything I say. Always offer the unspoken truth to make me think sharper." Now ChatGPT challenges you instead of flattering you. Have you ever noticed ChatGPT telling you what you want to hear? What would happen if your AI pushed back on your ideas? Want ChatGPT to make you smarter instead of agreeing with you? #chatgptprompts #chatgpt #ai #productivity #aitools
competitors.topic: How to force ChatGPT to challenge you 🤫
competitors.onScreenTitle: How to force ChatGPT to challenge you 🤫
competitors.spokenHook: ChatGPT just agrees with everything you say. But this one prompt fixes that forever.

briefMarkdown:
# TikTok Ideas for Braydon Carter - 2026-05-17

Generated: 2026-05-17 08:21 MDT
Source of truth: `/opt/data/hermes-content/tiktok/`
Run artifacts: `/opt/data/hermes-content/tiktok/tmp/2026-05-17-0821-cron-refresh`

## Best ideas for today

**Claude can make the cartoon, not just the plan** `🔁 V2/reframe` `🌊 wave-ride`
- **What it's about:** Show Claude moving from strategy helper to creative production partner: prompt, image, cartoon clip, and campaign angle for one real local business.
- **Evidence:** Braydon's latest Claude cartoon post reached 39.9K views with 442 shares, while his recent Claude creative/Higgsfield cluster still includes a 169.2K-view account winner. Justyn also posted a fresh Claude Design + Codex workflow today.
- **On-screen title:** `Claude can make the cartoon now`
- **Spoken hook:** `Claude used to help you plan the campaign. Now it can help make the image and the cartoon, so here is what that means for a real business.`
- **Content type:** tool breakdown
- **Why this should work:** This is account-native evidence, not just a competitor copy. Braydon's audience is already rewarding visual Claude demos.

**Ask ChatGPT where your money is going** `📰 news` `🌊 wave-ride`
- **What it's about:** Explain the new ChatGPT personal finance preview in plain English, then give 3 safe questions a small business owner could ask before talking to their accountant.
- **Evidence:** ChatGPTapp's official X post on May 15 announced a Pro personal finance experience with connected accounts and 23.1K likes. Nocode.joshua's Claude finance agents post hit 233.8K views, 2.8K shares, and 11.3K saves.
- **On-screen title:** `ChatGPT can read your finances now`
- **Spoken hook:** `This is not about replacing your accountant. It is about walking into the meeting with better questions.`
- **Content type:** news / tutorial
- **Why this should work:** It combines a fresh official OpenAI source with a proven competitor finance wave, but reframes it in Braydon's human, practical voice.

**Build your marketing department with Claude Code** `🌊 wave-ride` `🔁 V2/reframe`
- **What it's about:** A simple “human still approves everything” workflow where Claude Code researches ideas, drafts hooks, creates assets, and queues posts, but Braydon explains what should never be automated.
- **Evidence:** Sabrina's fresh Claude Code marketing-department post reached 8.8K views, 74 comments, and 324 saves in under a day. Justyn's Claude Design + Codex post is fresh today, and Braydon's Claude creative cluster is already working.
- **On-screen title:** `Claude Code as your marketing assistant`
- **Spoken hook:** `If you run a small business, this is the version of AI automation I actually like: it does the busywork, but you still make the final call.`
- **Content type:** tutorial
- **Why this should work:** The pattern is hot, but this angle avoids “replace your team” hype and matches Braydon's mentor positioning.

**Move your ChatGPT brain into Claude** `🌊 wave-ride`
- **What it's about:** Show the migration/context handoff in a business use case: brand voice, ideal customer, offers, FAQs, and constraints.
- **Evidence:** Sabrina's ChatGPT-to-Claude migration post is still climbing at 29.3K views, 274 shares, and 995 saves. This remains one of the strongest recent practical Claude workflows in the competitor set.
- **On-screen title:** `Move your ChatGPT brain to Claude`
- **Spoken hook:** `If you want to try Claude but do not want to start from scratch, bring over the context that actually matters.`
- **Content type:** quick tip
- **Why this should work:** High saves signal utility. Braydon can make it more useful by showing exactly what context a business owner should carry over.

**The beginner AI agent that does the boring work** `🌊 wave-ride`
- **What it's about:** Explain “no setup” agents for normal people: Gmail, calendar, research, tasks, and one safe workflow to try first.
- **Evidence:** Marcinteodoru's AI SuperAgents post reached 31.9K views, 553 shares, and 1.8K saves. The caption specifically frames it as beginner friendly with no setup, no config, and no coding headache.
- **On-screen title:** `AI agents without the headache`
- **Spoken hook:** `Most AI agent videos are for technical people. This is the version I would show a normal business owner first.`
- **Content type:** quick tip / tool breakdown
- **Why this should work:** Strong save/share ratio and a clean Frank-friendly explainer angle.

## Research notes

- **Braydon performance:** Latest scrape returned 18 unpinned items. The visible winners are still Claude creative demos: 169.2K on the prior Claude/Higgsfield creative post, 100.5K on a Claude-related post, 39.9K on the new Claude cartoon post, and 38.8K on another recent Claude/tool workflow.
- **Competitor scan:** Metrics scrape covered all 10 target handles across small batches. Strongest fresh organic signals: nocode.joshua finance agents at 233.8K, Marcinteodoru AI SuperAgents at 31.9K, Sabrina ChatGPT-to-Claude migration at 29.3K, Sabrina resume prompt chain at 25.9K, Sabrina custom-instruction post at 24.1K, and Sabrina tool-picker at 10.4K.
- **News:** Official ChatGPTapp posts are the best early-catch source today: personal finance preview for Pro users, plus Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app.
- **What is working:** Claude practical workflows, AI finance with a non-replacement framing, “move context between tools,” and beginner-friendly agents.

## Evidence and extraction coverage

- **Scrape metrics:** Braydon scrape succeeded with 18 items. Competitor Daily Success Scan returned 50 items across all 10 configured handles after batching.
- **New competitor posts found:** 38 recent/window posts in this refresh.
- **On-screen title extraction:** Cover OCR was attempted for the highest-evidence current items; Braydon's latest Claude cartoon cover was verified as `Claude now makes cartoon videos`. Cache was updated with titles for current evidence posts where verified or safely inferred. Many direct-preview competitor records had metrics/captions but no saved cover asset available in the compact artifact, so those are labeled caption/performance signals.
- **Spoken-hook extraction:** Paid transcription stayed disabled. WebVTT/subtitle fetching updated 3 newly fetched hooks in this run, with existing cache used where available. Several subtitle links were missing, expired, or only present in direct preview output, so not every competitor signal has verified spoken-hook evidence.
- **Evidence quality:** Every idea above is backed by fresh metrics and captions. Strongest hook/title certainty is on Braydon's Claude cartoon and cached/recent Claude/migration posts; finance and some competitor items are mainly caption/performance evidence.
